title: tephrosia shiluwanensis
intro: Tephrosia shiluwanensis is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, commonly known as the pea or bean family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Tephrosia shiluwanensis include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of fever, wounds, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
